home.hero_title: Two gems in the heart of Marrakech
home.hero_subtitle: Experience Moroccan art de vivre in our exceptional riads
home.brand_eyebrow: A jewel in the heart of the medina
home.brand_p1: Nestled in the vibrant heart of the Marrakech medina, close to the mythical Jemaa el-Fna square, Dar Baraï and Dar Tanawi are two exceptional addresses in a historic quarter inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list.
home.brand_p2: Built in 2023, our two riads draw on traditional Moroccan and Andalusian architecture — patios, zellige, mashrabiya — while offering thoughtful design and fully modern comfort.
home.brand_p3: Available for exclusive rental, our two riads offer the intimacy of a private residence and the refinement of a tailor-made stay - for two, with family or friends.
home.riads_section_subtitle: Each riad is rented exclusively - you enjoy the entire property and its private spaces, in complete privacy.
home.riads_section_note: You can also rent both riads, which are connected via their respective terraces
home.location_subtitle: Both riads are located a 10-minute walk from Jemaa el-Fna square.
home.services_section_subtitle: A personalised experience for a tailor-made stay
home.services_description: We offer a wide range of services to enhance your stay: airport transfer, massages, hammam, nature excursions, Berber village visits, event organisation in Marrakech (rooftops, bars, restaurants), exceptional dinners at the Riad...
home.service_hammam_desc: Several partner establishments are located around the riad, offering excellent massages and hammam experiences in a refined and authentic setting.
home.service_excursions_desc: We have partnerships with numerous trusted guides and drivers who allow you to explore Morocco with ease and authenticity (Atlas, desert, Essaouira, Ouzoud, Ourika…).
home.service_visites_desc: We offer a curated list of visits and activities based on our favourite spots in Marrakech — places we have patiently discovered, tested and loved. A true treasure in our eyes!
home.experiences_subtitle: Pool, hammam, Moroccan breakfast, excursions — we take care of every detail for an unforgettable stay.
home.trust_title:
Our guests' trust,
our greatest pride
home.parallax_text:
In the heart of the medina,
where the soul of Marrakech
reveals itself fully.
home.hl_location_desc: A 10-minute walk from Jemaa el-Fna, the vibrant heart of Marrakech, in the peaceful Kasbah district — perfect for exploring the city.
home.hl_rooms_desc: Thoughtfully decorated rooms blending Moroccan authenticity with unparalleled comfort.
home.hl_rooftop_desc: Each riad features a bespoke rooftop terrace, designed so you can fully enjoy Marrakech's glorious sunshine.
home.hl_service_desc: A dedicated housekeeper is present in each riad, entirely devoted to your comfort and ready to fulfil your every wish.
home.hl_meals_desc: Hand-picked for their exceptional culinary talent, our housekeepers prepare traditional Moroccan dishes that rival the finest restaurants in the city.
home.hl_activities_desc: We are available by message and phone throughout your stay to suggest a wide range of carefully curated activities.
home.hl_breakfast_desc: Every morning, indulge in our exceptional breakfasts made from fresh market produce.
home.hl_visits_desc: Museum, shopping or a restaurant in town — our intimate knowledge of Marrakech means we can guide you to the very best addresses throughout your stay.

riads.page_subtitle: Two exceptional addresses to experience Marrakech differently
riads.gouvernante_text: In each riad, a housekeeper is present daily to take care of you. She prepares delicious Moroccan breakfasts, ensures daily housekeeping, and can also cook meals on request — from lunch to dinner, traditional dishes prepared with care.
riads.breakfast_title: Wake up to our signature breakfast
riads.breakfast_subtitle: Let us know the evening before what time you'd like breakfast — we take care of the rest. Everything is homemade!
riads.breakfast_menu_1: Freshly squeezed orange juice, coffee, mint tea, milk
riads.breakfast_menu_2: Your choice of: French toast, crêpes, waffles, pancakes
riads.breakfast_menu_4: Jams, whipped fresh cheese, cream cheese, chocolate spread, amlou (a traditional spread made from finely ground roasted almonds, pure argan oil and honey)
riads.breakfast_menu_6: Orange slices with cinnamon, Hard-boiled eggs, Clementines, Avocado, Cherry tomatoes
riads.breakfast_note: Some items are subject to availability — feel free to let us know in advance what you'd like to have.

services.page_subtitle: Bespoke experiences to enrich your stay in Marrakech.
services.page_description: Contact us to tell us which services you would like. We recommend letting us know at least 48 hours in advance so we can organise everything in the best possible conditions.
services.empty: No services available at the moment.
services.riad_specific_note: Some services are only available in one of the two riads — this is indicated on each relevant service.

booking.tourist_tax: A mandatory tourist tax of 26 Dhs (~€2.50) per night per person is payable directly on-site. It is collected by the city of Marrakech.

seo.home_title: Dar Baraï & Dar Tanawi – Riads in Marrakech
seo.home_description: Book your stay in our two exceptional riads in the heart of the Marrakech medina.
seo.riads_title: Our Riads – Dar Baraï & Dar Tanawi

contact.hero_subtitle: Our team is available to answer all your questions and help you plan your stay.

about.title: About
about.p1: We are delighted to welcome you to our authentic and warm riad in the heart of the Marrakech medina.
about.p2: We will do our very best to make your stay as enjoyable as possible.
about.p3: Enjoy the peace and serenity of our riad, a reflection of Moroccan culture and art, to recharge and immerse yourself in the enchanting atmosphere of Marrakech.
about.p4: In this guide you will find useful information for a smooth stay, as well as all our favourite addresses in Marrakech — places we have patiently discovered, tested and loved. A true treasure in our eyes!
about.p5: We hope your stay at Dar Baraï will be memorable and meet all your expectations.
about.p6: Please do not hesitate to reach out for any request or need, as our priority is to offer you an unforgettable experience.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Discover our two riads through their spaces, rooms and most secret corners.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.cat1_q1: Are the riads available for exclusive rental?
faq.cat1_a1: Yes, each riad is rented exclusively. You enjoy the entire property and its private spaces in complete intimacy — just for you, with family or friends.
faq.cat1_q2: Is there a minimum number of nights?
faq.cat1_a2: Yes, we ask for a minimum of 3 nights to fully enjoy the experience.
faq.cat1_q3: How does arrival at the riad work?
faq.cat1_a3: Our housekeeper will personally welcome you at the riad, hand over the keys and show you around. We remain available by message throughout your stay.
faq.cat1_a4: Absolutely, children are welcome in both riads.
faq.cat2_q1: What is included in the rental?
faq.cat2_a1: The rental includes a personalised welcome, a daily housekeeper, daily housekeeping and a Moroccan breakfast every morning.
faq.cat2_q2: Can we have dinner at the riad?
faq.cat2_a2: Yes! Our housekeeper can prepare lunches and dinners on request, using traditional Moroccan recipes. Just let us know the day before.
faq.cat2_a3: Yes, high-speed Wi-Fi is available free of charge in both riads.
faq.cat2_a4: Of course. We offer many optional services: airport transfer, hammam & massages, excursions, activity planning... Feel free to contact us for more information.
faq.cat3_q1: Where exactly are the riads located?
faq.cat3_a1: Both riads are located in the Kasbah district, a 10-minute walk from Jemaa el-Fna square. The precise address is provided upon booking confirmation.
faq.cat3_q2: How do we get to the riad from the airport?
faq.cat3_a2: We offer an airport transfer service on request. You can also take a taxi from Marrakech-Menara Airport (around 20-30 minutes depending on traffic).
faq.cat3_q3: Can we access the riad by car?
faq.cat3_a3: The medina's alleyways are not accessible by car. Your driver will drop you nearby. If needed, our housekeeper can come and guide you to the riad.
faq.cat3_a4: You can book directly on our website or contact us by phone or email. We'll be happy to answer all your questions before your arrival.
